title: Sweet Irish Toast Bowl
description: A crumbly, sweet breakfast bowl featuring toasted sourdough, fermented oat yogurt, and a medley of nuts, seeds, and berries. It is a perfect meal-prep option for a quick, macrobiotic-friendly start to the day.
instructions: Slice the sourdough bread into thick pieces and set aside.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and add the butter.
Place the bread slices in the skillet and toast until golden brown on both sides, about 2 minutes per side.
Transfer the toasted bread to a cutting board and slice each slice into bite‑sized cubes.
In a bowl, stir the fermented oat yogurt with a pinch of sea salt until smooth.
Spread a generous spoonful of the yogurt onto the center of each toasted bread cube.
Sprinkle the toasted rolled oats, chopped walnuts, and chia seeds evenly over the yogurt.
Top each toast cube with a handful of fresh berries and a drizzle of maple syrup.
Garnish with a fresh mint leaf and a light dusting of sea salt.
Serve immediately or store the components separately in the fridge to assemble before eating.
